description.zh-Hans: 生成像素艺术盾牌，可配置形状、纹章配色和装饰元素。适用于角色装备和UI图标。
description.en: Generates pixel art shields with configurable shape, heraldic colors, and decorative elements. Suitable for character equipment and UI icons.

triggers.zh-Hans: 盾牌, 护盾, 纹章, 防具, 骑士盾, 装备图标
triggers.en: shield, heraldry, crest, armor, knight, equipment icon

exampleUsage.zh-Hans: 生成像素艺术盾牌，用于角色装备图标或UI界面展示。
exampleUsage.en: Generate pixel-art shields for character equipment icons or UI display.
